packageRules.description: Automerge low-risk updates once CI (docker-publish on PR) is green: patch/minor, dev deps, Docker digest pins, lockfile refresh.
Major bumps always go through a PR for manual review (e.g. nodemailer/pino/@types/node).

vendor/zeroclaw is hand-pinned and bumped only after local testing (deploy/MAINTENANCE.md): always PR, never automerge, not schedule-bound. Keep this rule LAST so it overrides the digest-automerge above for submodule commits.
